title: 7 Real Estate Stocks to Avoid as Fears of Unsustainability Rise
text: While the booming economy supports property investments in theory, the granularity suggests thinking about real estate stocks to avoid. The post 7 Real Estate Stocks to Avoid as Fears of Unsustainability Rise appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Essex Property Trust Publishes 2021 TCFD Climate Change Risk Report
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announced the release of its 2021 Task Force on Climate-Related Financial Disclosures (“TCFD”) report. This report is a supplement to our upcoming 2021 Corporate Social Responsibility (“CSR”) report to be published in May 2022. With this report, the Company expands its reporting and transparency with respect to environmental initiatives by incorporating the TCFD framework into our ongoing CSR strategy, further aligning wi

title: Essex Property Trust to Present at The 2022 Citigroup Global Property CEO Conference
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) announced today that Michael J. Schall, President and CEO, will be participating in a roundtable presentation at the 2022 Citigroup Global Property CEO Conference held in Hollywood, FL on Monday, March 7, 2022, at 11:15 a.m. Eastern Time. title: Why Essex Property Trust's Dividend Has Grown for More Than 25 Years
text: The REIT has a strong foothold in some of the most attractive real estate markets in America.
